title: Kaalai Kaalai Lyrics Manithan
stanzas: <div>Kaalai Kaalai Muratu Kaalai Song Lyrics Manithan

Kaalai kaalai
murattuk kaalai

Murattu kaalai neethaanaa
pokkiri raja neethaanaa
paayum puliyum neethanaaa
bayanthu povadhu sarithaanaa

vazhvome onnoadu onnaa
vaalibam yaengudhu
endhiri kannaa

Kaalai kaalai
murattuk kaalai

Murattu kaalai naanthaandi
pokkiri raja naanthaandi
paayum puliyum naanthaandi
bayanthu poga maattendi

naadellaam en perai sollum
nallavanukku nallavan thaandi

Ullkaaichal yeralaiyo
un ullam maaralaiyo
kanjikku alaithaeno
pasi illaiyo..

nejamaathaan yaenguriyaa
nee enna pombalayaa
enna vitta unakkaedhum
vazhi illaiyaa

ada maamaa azhalaamaa
naan thaali kattattaa

adi maane thimir thaane
un kottam adakkira
kattravan naane.

Kaalai kaalai
murattuk kaalai

Murattu kaalai naanthaandi
pokkiri raja naanthaandi
paayum puliyum neethanaaa
bayanthu povadhu sarithaanaa

naadellaam en perai sollum
nallavanukku nallavan thaandi

pombalaiya seraama
poi serndha aalugala
kattaiyila thee kooda
theendaathaiyaa

selaikkul theriyaama
sikkivitta aamabalaikku
sorgathil idamedhum
kidaiyathammaa

kilipole thol mele
naan yaerikollattaa
enna penmai enna menmai
un karpinai kannadhum
kannagi kettaa.

Kaalai kaalai
murattuk kaalai

Murattu kaalai neethaanaa
pokkiri raja neethaanaa
paayum puliyum neethanaaa
bayanthu povadhu sarithaanaa

vazhvome onnoadu onnaa
vaalibam yaengudhu
endhiri kannaa

Kaalai kaalai
murattuk kaalai

Murattu kaalai naanthaandi
pokkiri raja naanthaandi
paayum puliyum naanthaandi
bayanthu poga maattendi

naadellaam em perai sollum
nallavanukku nallavan thaandi

Kaalai kaalai
murattuk kaalai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kaalai Kaalai?

The song is energetic and motivational, celebrating youthful vigor and courage.

Who are the singers of Kaalai Kaalai?

The song is sung by S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and S. P. Shailaja.

Who composed the music for the song?

The music was composed by Chandrabose.

What is the release year of the movie Manithan?

The movie Manithan was released in 1987.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song captures the protagonist's determination and fearless spirit, aligning with the movie's themes of courage and resilience.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kaalai Kaalai from the movie Manithan is a high-energy track that embodies the spirit of youthful exuberance and determination. Sung by the legendary duo S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and S. P. Shailaja, the song's powerful lyrics by Vairamuthu and dynamic composition by Chandrabose make it a memorable anthem. It reflects the protagonist's fearless attitude and drive to overcome challenges. The song's lively beats and motivational theme make it perfect for celebrations and energizing moments.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Feel the adrenaline rush with Kaalai Kaalai from the movie Manithan. This energetic duet, brought to life by the powerful voices of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and S. P. Shailaja, is a testament to Chandrabose's dynamic composition. Dive into the motivational beats and experience the vibrant energy that defines this classic track.
stanzaMeanings: Morning, morning, fierce bull.
Are you the fierce bull, are you the rogue king, are you the leaping tiger, is it Saritha who is scared?
Let's live together as one, youth is calling, my dear.
Morning, morning, fierce bull.
I am the fierce bull, I am the rogue king, I am the leaping tiger, I won't be scared.
Everywhere people say my name, I am good even to the good ones.
Is it a fever or a lung problem, has your heart changed, did I stir the porridge, are you not hungry?
Are you really longing, are you a woman, without me do you have no way?
Hey uncle, don't cry, should I tie the wedding chain?
Oh dear, your arrogance, I am the one who can control your anger.
Morning, morning, fierce bull.
I am the fierce bull, I am the rogue king, are you the leaping tiger, is it Saritha who is scared?
Everywhere people say my name, I am good even to the good ones.
Without joining women, even fire won't touch the people who joined.
For the man trapped unknowingly in the net, there is no place in heaven.
Should I climb on your shoulder like a parrot, what femininity, what softness, even Kannagi questioned your chastity.
Morning, morning, fierce bull.
Are you the fierce bull, are you the rogue king, are you the leaping tiger, is it Saritha who is scared?
Let's live together as one, youth is calling, my dear.
Morning, morning, fierce bull.
I am the fierce bull, I am the rogue king, I am the leaping tiger, I won't be scared.
Everywhere people say my name, I am good even to the good ones.
Morning, morning, fierce bull.
